text:

The email body lists the following incident IDs: PD-400, PD-401, PD-403, PD-411, and PD-418.

I did NOT post to the 'incidents' Slack channel because there WERE high urgency incidents in triggered state (contrary to the "all clear" condition).
I'll help you check PagerDuty incidents and take the appropriate action. Let me start by examining the PagerDuty incidents table structure, then query for high urgency incidents in triggered state.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'pagerduty_incidents'"}

text: Now let me check for high urgency incidents in the triggered state:

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id, title, service, created_at FROM pagerduty_incidents WHERE status = 'triggered' AND urgency = 'high'"}
